description: Primary branching routes for the voice elicitation engine. Based on screening question responses, routes respondents into one of four writing-context paths.

creative_literary.description: Creative/Literary path — activates narrativity, authority/register, and mechanics modules for writers in fiction, poetry, or creative nonfiction contexts

business_professional.description: Business/Professional path — activates audience awareness, authority/register, and contextual adaptation modules for business, marketing, and corporate writers

academic_technical.description: Academic/Technical path — activates complexity/structure, authority/register, and mechanics modules for academic, technical, and scientific writers

personal_journalistic.description: Personal/Journalistic path — activates narrativity, audience awareness, and contextual adaptation modules for personal, journalism, blog, and social media writers

notes.branch_selection: Evaluate conditions in order; first matching branch wins. Fall through to default_branch if no conditions match.
notes.experience_level_min: Only creative_literary requires a minimum experience level (3 on a 1-7 scale). All other branches match on writer_context alone.
notes.activated_modules: These modules are added to the base module sequence. Core modules (M01-M04, M09, M12) are always administered regardless of branch.
